content: We can hypothesize that combining the no-training, no-supervision iterative feedback structure of Self-Refine with the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives of LLM self-reflection mechanisms will create a lightweight self-improving LLM system that outperforms both existing approaches. The resulting framework would enable the model to first generate diverse conflicting attempts at a task, then iteratively refine its own output by comparing these perspectives without any additional labeled data or external reward signal.
